scripts.pre: yarn run gen-config; yarn run gen-scss; yarn run i18n-compile
scripts.build: yarn run pre && vite -c front/vite.config.js build
scripts.lint: ko=0; yarn run -s jslint || ko=1; yarn run -s csslint || ko=1; [ ! $ko -eq 1 ]
scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ -n "$QUICK" ]; then vitest -c front/vite.config.js --run --no-coverage "$@"; else yarn run pre && vitest -c front/vite.config.js "$@"; fi' --

@comment dependencies.@emotion/react: Styling lib used by Material UI
@comment dependencies.@emotion/styled: Styling lib used by Material UI
@comment dependencies.@mui/material: React component library that implements Google's Material Design
@comment dependencies.@mui/x-date-pickers: React component library for date selector
@comment dependencies.@tanstack/react-query: Asynchronous state management, server-state utilities and data fetching
@comment dependencies.@tanstack/router-plugin: Tanstack router plugin for file based routing
@comment dependencies.graphql-request: GraphQL client supporting Node and browsers
@comment dependencies.apollo-upload-client: To allow to upload binary files with Graphql
@comment dependencies.mapbox-gl: To draw maps and geographic features
@comment dependencies.react-dropzone: React component library for file drop zone

@comments devDependencies.@tanstack/react-devtools: Developper tool UI for router and query
@comments devDependencies.@tanstack/react-query-devtools: Developper tool UI for tanstack query
@comments devDependencies.@tanstack/react-router-devtools: Developper tool UI for tanstack router
@comments devDependencies.@vitest/coverage-istanbul: Coverage, using istanbul, for vitest. In place of v8 that gives bad coverage result
@comments devDependencies.@vitest/ui: Allow to drive vitest from the browser
@comments devDependencies.jsdom: Vitest environment with many browser features implemented
@comments devDependencies.eslint-plugin-react-hooks: Linter plugin to check hooks dependencies
@comments devDependencies.eslint-plugin-react-refresh: Validate that components can safely be updated with Fast Refresh
@comments devDependencies.@stylistic/eslint-plugin: Plugin that contains recommended rules because they have been deprecated in ESLint
